items.name_en: Bottega Veneta BV Gemelli Twin Bag (Shu Qi Style) Pre-locked, 2024 Bestseller 💕 The Gemelli consists of two crescent bags paired together, featuring the brand's signature intrecciato weaving. It comes with a detachable tubular handle, serving as a clutch, shoulder bag, or with the small crescent flipped to serve as a handle. The dual design is full of personality and charm, creating a visual impact that brings an elegant and fashionable feel. The unique structural design creates duality and volume
items.name_cn:
Bottega Veneta BV Gemelli Twin Bag (Shu Qi Style) Pre-locked, 2024 Bestseller 💕 The Gemelli consists of two crescent bags paired together, featuring the brand's signature intrecciato weaving. It comes with a detachable tubular handle, serving as a clutch, shoulder bag, or with the small crescent flipped to serve as a handle. The dual design is full of personality and charm, creating a visual impact that brings an elegant and fashionable feel. The unique structural design creates duality and volume
Multiple carrying styles to meet different needs and occasions
Style No.: 764053
Size: 42*30*12cm

items.name_en: Bottega Veneta BVII New Color-Block Gemelli Bag. The Gemelli twin-bag silhouette is deeply loved, and now a color-block version has been released. New woven bag~ unique and high-end. The artistic weaving style showcases the charm of simplicity and luxury. Every style reveals a generous temperament. I'm falling more in love with the Bottega Veneta vibe!
